title: Bridge Essay: Multisensory conflict affects body schema and reaching space.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, body ownership as constructed percept.

**Multisensory conflict affects body schema and reaching space.**. Sci Rep.. PMID: 39068279. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-024-66724-4. Multisensory integration plays acrucial role in building the sense of body ownership, i.e., the perceptual status of one'sbody for which the body is perceived as belonging to oneself. Temporal and spatial mismatching of visual and tactile signals coming from one'sbody can reduce ownership feelings towards the body and its parts, i.e., produce disownership feelings.
